message:
feat(atc): add retention and replay APIs (br-bn0vb.5)

Implements query_open_experiences() as a full ExperienceRow read path with since/stratum filtering, plus retention_compact() and replay() for the ATC ledger.

Validation:
- rch exec -- cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-db atc_queries::tests:: -- --nocapture ✅ (19 passed)
- rch exec -- cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-core -p mcp-agent-mail-db ⚠️ mcp-agent-mail-core passed; mcp-agent-mail-db remains red in unrelated existing pool/queries/reconstruct/search_recipes tests
- rch exec -- cargo check -p mcp-agent-mail-server --test e2e_atc_learning_loop ✅ against the local untracked harness
- rch exec -- cargo clippy -p mcp-agent-mail-db -p mcp-agent-mail-server --tests -- -D warnings ⚠️ blocked by existing asupersync compile errors
